greeting: 👋 Hi! I'm the ThinkTech assistant. Pick a topic or ask your question.
fallback: I didn't quite understand. Here are the topics I can help with:

topics.label: Deployment time
topics.answer: Depending on project complexity, a platform can be operational within 2 to 6 weeks.

topics.label: Mobile compatibility
topics.answer: Yes, all our platforms are mobile-first, with low data consumption.

topics.label: Data security
topics.answer: Your data is protected: secure hosting, HTTPS, regular backups and strict access management.

topics.label: Pricing
topics.answer: Every project is unique: pricing depends on the number of learners and desired features. Book a free demo to get a tailored quote.

topics.label: Third-party integration
topics.answer: Yes, we can connect your platform to your existing tools (payment, HR, video conferencing...).

topics.label: Talk to a human
topics.answer: Happy to help! Click below to book a demo with our team.
